# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create Kafka broker configuration file (server.properties) for production deployment. Configure listeners, log directories, and replication settings. Set up Zookeeper connection and broker ID. This is for our distributed Kafka cluster.
# Category: kafka_topic_authorization

# server.properties
broker.id=1001
listeners=PLAINTEXT://your_ip:9092,SSL://your_ip:9093
advertised.listeners=PLAINTEXT://your_domain_name:9092
num.network.threads=3
num.io.threads=8
log.dirs=/data/kafka-logs
num.partitions=16
log.retention.hours=48
message.max.bytes=104857600
replica.fetch.wait.max.ms=200
zk.connect=your_zookeeper_connection:2181/path/to/chroot
group.initial.rebalance.delay.ms=0
socket.timeout.ms=30000
num.replica.fetchers=2
